title: UserPromptSubmit hook for memory injection
userStory: As Steve, I want my prompts in personal/ pre-augmented with relevant graph hits so that I do not have to mention Notion or the brain explicitly.
acceptanceCriteria: Reads prompt from stdin; exits 0 if cwd is not under personal/
Calls Graphiti search_nodes(query=prompt, limit=5) with 800ms timeout
On hits, prepends a <relevant-memory> block to the prompt with the top 5 entries
On timeout or error, logs to .claude/logs/inject_memory.log and exits 0 (silent degrade)
.claude/settings.json adds hooks.UserPromptSubmit entry pointing at the script
